important_caveats: results.zip contains markdown outputs only; original image files are not packaged in the three supplied files.
batch_summary says 12/82 succeeded, 69/82 skipped, and 1/82 failed; do not claim every image was OCRed.
records with batch_status=skipped may still contain extracted article text, but image OCR success is not proven.
manual_reviewed=true means the local markdown text was manually inspected and mapped to recommendation evidence where possible.
article_evidence_index.json is a core extracted index and does not carry source body excerpts.
When exact original wording is necessary, go back to the generation workspace source markdown or the article URL; the installed skill keeps only extracted evidence.
